comments: Pre-Donington Special’ - back stage at Donington the day before the show.
Many thanks to Hal C F Astell for this recording being made available.

track_listing.track: ‘My Morning Song’ (LP- The Southern Harmony and Musical Companion) (Def American)
Mick Wall interviews Ricky Warwick of The Almighty
‘Chainsaw Charlie (Murders in the Rue Morgue)’ (LP-Crimson Idol)) (Parlophone)
Mick Wall interviews Blackie Lawless of W.A.S.P.
‘Dead Skin Mask’ (LP-Seasons in the Abyss) (Def American)
Mick Wall interviews Tom Araya and Kerry King of Slayer
‘Laughing on Judgement Day’ (LP-Laughing on Judgement Day) (EMI)
Tommy interviews Luke Morley, Danny Bowes, Gary ‘Harry’ James & Mark ‘Snake’ Luckhurst of Thunder

track_listing.details: Live performance in the studio on the night
Live performance in the studio on the night

track_listing.track: Tape ends after Tommy’s back ref
